title: Ghosalegad Fort
tagline: Ghosalegad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Ghosalegad Fort is located 8 km south of the Roha town on Roha-Bhalgaon-Murud road.
overview.description: Ghosalegad Fort is located 8 km south of the Roha town on Roha-Bhalgaon-Murud road. This fort is in form of a narrow strip 20mt in width. This fort has a small hill with a narrow spur guarded by fortification.

topPlaces.name: Roha Ashtami
topPlaces.description: Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Birwadi fort
topPlaces.description: Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. Birwadi village is about 3 km away from Chanera village, which is on the Roha–Salav road.

topPlaces.name: Roha
topPlaces.description: Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.

topPlaces.name: Kuda Caves
topPlaces.description: Kuda Caves are located in the small village of Kuda, on the eastern side of the north shore of Murud-Janjira in south Konkan, India. These fifteen Buddhist caves are small, simple, and were excavated in first century BCE. The verandah of Chaitya has several reliefs of the Buddha, carved with symbols of lotus, wheel and Nagas.

topPlaces.name: Talagad
topPlaces.description: Talgad fort is located 18 km south of the Roha town on Roha-Tala-Indapur road. This fort is at an altitude of 1000 feet.

topPlaces.name: Dhatau
topPlaces.description: Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

items.note: Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. Birwadi village is about 3 km away from Chanera village, which is on the Roha–Salav road.
Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.

Kuda Caves are located in the small village of Kuda, on the eastern side of the north shore of Murud-Janjira in south Konkan, India. These fifteen Buddhist caves are small, simple, and were excavated in first century BCE. The verandah of Chaitya has several reliefs of the Buddha, carved with symbols of lotus, wheel and Nagas.
Talgad fort is located 18 km south of the Roha town on Roha-Tala-Indapur road. This fort is at an altitude of 1000 feet.
Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ghosalegad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ghosalegad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ghosalegad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ghosalegad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ghosalegad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ghosalegad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Ghosalegad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ghosalegad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Roha Ashtami, Birwadi fort, Roha, Kuda Caves, Talagad.
